Class JPipeBaseListener

java.lang.Object
ca.mcscert.jpipe.lang.JPipeBaseListener
All Implemented Interfaces:
JPipeListener, org.antlr.v4.runtime.tree.ParseTreeListener
public class JPipeBaseListener extends Object implements JPipeListener
This class provides an empty implementation of JPipeListener, which can be extended to create a listener which only needs to handle a subset of the available methods.

    • enterUnit

      public void enterUnit(JPipeParser.UnitContext ctx)
      Enter a parse tree produced by JPipeParser.unit().

      The default implementation does nothing.

      Specified by:
      enterUnit in interface JPipeListener
      Parameters:
      ctx - the parse tree
